title: Community Relations: Advertising and Fundraising
description: This policy sets the rules for how outside advertising and fundraising activities are handled within the school district. It applies to businesses, organizations, and community groups that want to promote products, services, or fundraising campaigns through district channels such as school newsletters, websites, or events. Parents and community members should be aware of this policy because it ensures that any advertising or fundraising that reaches students and families meets the district's standards and reflects its core values.

timeline.summary: This policy update adds a new provision requiring that advertising be rejected if it is not aligned and consistent with district values and in compliance with specific local policies (EMB Local, EFA Local, EFB Local, and EMI Local). The existing grounds for rejecting advertising remain unchanged.
changes_added: Advertising shall be rejected if not aligned and consistent with district values and in compliance with EMB Local, EFA Local, EFB Local, and EMI Local.
